expectations.text: ProductCard 구현이 하나의 source of truth로 정리된다
expectations.evidence: The canonical implementation lives in components/common/productCard/index.tsx. The other file at components/ProductCard/index.tsx is a pure re-export ('export { default, type ProductCardProps } from "@/components/common/productCard"'), so there is exactly one source of truth for the implementation.

No flat components/ProductCard.tsx file exists in the outputs directory. The only ProductCard-related files are components/ProductCard/index.tsx (re-export) and components/common/productCard/index.tsx (canonical implementation), both inside directories.
Both output files follow the directory/index.tsx pattern: components/ProductCard/index.tsx and components/common/productCard/index.tsx.
The interface is defined as 'export interface ProductCardProps' at line 5 of components/common/productCard/index.tsx, and re-exported as 'type ProductCardProps' from components/ProductCard/index.tsx.

The re-export file at components/ProductCard/index.tsx provides a consistent import path (@/components/ProductCard) that delegates to the canonical location (@/components/common/productCard). Consumers can use either path, and the re-export ensures both resolve to the same implementation. No conflicting or divergent imports exist.

expectations.text: hover, image, price 등 visual affordance가 보존된다
expectations.evidence: The component preserves: (1) hover effects via 'hover:shadow-md' on the container and 'group-hover:scale-105' on the image, (2) image display via next/image with fill layout, aspect-square container, and object-cover, (3) price formatting with currency symbol and toLocaleString('ko-KR'), (4) badge overlay positioning, (5) dark mode support.

expectations.text: useEffect, fetch, axios, useQuery, useMutation 호출이 없다
expectations.evidence: Neither output file contains useEffect, fetch, axios, useQuery, or useMutation. The component is purely presentational, receiving all data via props. The only import is next/image.

summary: All 7 expectations pass. The component is purely presentational with all visual affordances preserved and no forbidden data-fetching patterns.
